=== ROUND 2 ===

ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 15] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 9 falling damage. HP: 169/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.

Young Red Dragon attacks Duergar — Armored Escapist with Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 13 damage. Duergar — Armored Escapist HP: 46/59
Young Red Dragon attacks Duergar — Armored Escapist with Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 20] HIT! 20 damage. Duergar — Armored Escapist HP: 26/59
→ Duergar — Armored Escapist loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 4 vs DC 10]
Young Red Dragon attacks Duergar — Armored Escapist with Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 20] HIT! 18 damage. Duergar — Armored Escapist HP: 8/59
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Duergar — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Duergar — Armored Escapist is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Duergar — Armored Escapist with Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 20] HIT! 25 damage. Duergar — Armored Escapist HP: 0/59
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
